desc:
# Agent Python Tools

- repo: oats
- repo_uri: https://github.com/district-solutions/open-agent-tools-coder.git

## File: oats/agent/agent.py

Prompts

```
['create a new Agent dataclass instance with a custom name, prompt, and agent_type', 'register a custom Agent into the AgentRegistry so it can be retrieved by name', 'get an Agent by name from the global registry using the get_agent function', 'list all available agents from the global registry using the list_agents function', 'get the global AgentRegistry singleton instance using the get_agent_registry function']
```

Usage

```
{'create_custom_agent': 'create a new Agent dataclass instance with a custom name, prompt, and agent_type', 'register_agent': 'register a custom Agent into the AgentRegistry so it can be retrieved by name', 'get_agent': 'get an Agent by name from the global registry using the get_agent function', 'list_agents': 'list all available agents from the global registry using the list_agents function', 'get_agent_registry': 'get the global AgentRegistry singleton instance using the get_agent_registry function'}
```
name: oats/agent/AGENT.python.tools.md

oats/agent/agent.py.create_custom_agent: create a new Agent dataclass instance with a custom name, prompt, and agent_type
oats/agent/agent.py.register_agent: register a custom Agent into the AgentRegistry so it can be retrieved by name
oats/agent/agent.py.get_agent: get an Agent by name from the global registry using the get_agent function
oats/agent/agent.py.list_agents: list all available agents from the global registry using the list_agents function
oats/agent/agent.py.get_agent_registry: get the global AgentRegistry singleton instance using the get_agent_registry function

ref_entities: create a new Agent dataclass instance with a custom name, prompt, and agent_type
register a custom Agent into the AgentRegistry so it can be retrieved by name
get an Agent by name from the global registry using the get_agent function
list all available agents from the global registry using the list_agents function
get the global AgentRegistry singleton instance using the get_agent_registry function
